terminal:
$ superx: a new repository with a capability that will have multiple sub web apps for various payment services for customers such as rent, education, utility, & wallet. These web apps will then be individually hosted for 5 different brands with entity names of superpe marketplace pvt ltd, spaid esolutions private limited, kuxdistro technology private limited, mewt account pvt ltd, slongo technology pvt ltd. Futher, each entity will have some or all of the services with their respective websites. They have many policies with their own names & titles. I'll give you the flow for wallet use case and policies -- but I want the strcuture to work in a way where all the website will be hosted on their own subdomains -- say education.spaid.in for spaid education and education.superpe.in for superpe but both will use the same webapp code with different styling(font, image, color, accent colors etc). All these web app will then be hosted on various subdomains such as wallet.<target> or rent.<target> -- I'll provide the targets accordingly.

domain for kuxdistro is kuxdistro.com and mewt is mewt.in

will vite be a good choice? further, authentication on all webapps will be via phone number OTP -- curl -X POST http://localhost:8000/api/v1/otp/send \
    -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
    -d '{
      "to": "+919867808810",
      "company": "Wirenow",
      "channel": "SMS",
      "provider": "twilio"
    }'

Further, for wallet webapp -- will be done only for superpe.in and slongo.in -- Wallet:

Copy the end to flow of ultrafastapi.com and replicate the same for superpe and slongo. Domains for the same will be superpe.in and slongo.in -- https://github.com/mewt-app/wallet-supercheckout for the wallet flow.



Improvements:
The landing page isn't good looking with direct phone number OTP — you can use sheets in styling and play with border radius of sheets for different brands. Save this styling to be followed later for other web apps from same brand — for example — border radius 0 for superpe with blue accent #266EF1 and white primary.

Further, put a brand specific background image in the background — line illustration for superpe, color  complicated one for spaid, black & white photo for Kux.


Similarly,

Education: will be there for all the domains

After logging in, customer sees 2 options — pay to school/institute or pay to tutor. Soon as the user clicks on tutor, a sheet opens telling this will require tutor registration. Then copy the cred flow (attached).
For the institute flow, take the same flow from https://github.com/mewt-app/spaid-education.

A seller flow that the receiver goes through also have to be cloned to each project -- seller-verification.<domain target>:
Copy the seller flow from spaid seller flow and accordingly update the formatting similar to the wallet one with brand specific styling. -- https://github.com/mewt-app/receiver-onboarding

Rent: for all domains.
The flow for rent will be same as education, just the name changed from education to rent, and from tutor to landlord. There will not be any institution flow.


Utility: for all domains.

You can get the entire utility webapp from https://github.com/mewt-app/spaid-landing & copy the flow end to end.

on landloard addition for rent flow, allow customer to mandatorily upload the rent agreement that gets checked by the AI with landloard name and sender name. Then, PG flow will be the same for all domains.
